title: Bubble Column Item Elevator
description: Carries dropped items straight up using a soul-sand bubble column. Build a vertical 1x1 shaft of any solid block, place a soul sand block at the bottom, and fill every shaft block with water source (in 1.20 each level becomes a source inside the column). Soul sand creates upward bubbles that drag items and the player upward; magma block would pull them down instead. Feed items in at the bottom with a hopper or dropper, and catch them at the top with a hopper into a chest. Cap the top with a solid block and a sign or trapdoor to hold the water in. Fast, cheap, and silent — the standard way to move items between floors.
